Body.Content:
Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention is extended to Microsoft 365 Copilot. This feature will allow DLP policies to provide detection of sensitivity labels in enterprise grounding data and restrict access of the content in Microsoft 365 Copilot. #copilotcontrolsystem

GA date: August CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing on content with sensitivity labels
